title: Chapter 33 Sub-Chapter 4.1 Overview
description: The Post-9/11 GI Bill provides financial support for education and housing to individuals with at least 90 days on active duty after September 10, 2001, or at least 30 days if discharged for a service-connected disability. This includes certain types of active duty served as a member of the Uniformed Services or because of a call up or mobilization to active duty from a reserve component (National Guard or Selected Reserve) under certain sections of Title 10 or Title 32.
